theme_concept: The Modern Renaissance: A sketch-driven, artistic movement celebrating feminine innovation.

core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Digital functionality meets analog soul.
Emotion First: Every interaction feels handwritten and personal.
Content is King: Storytelling through scrolling, not just information dumps.
Zoom In: Intimacy through macro sketches and texture.
Negative Space: Luxurious breathing room (3x standard padding).

typography.pairing_rule: Use 'Playfair Display' for emotional impact (Hero, Section Titles). Use 'Inter' for density (Rules, Agenda). Use 'Caveat' for annotations/human touch.

usage_rules: NEVER use pure black (#000000). Use Deep Plum (#4A2C40) for all main text.
Background is Warm Beige (#F5E6E8), NOT white.
Use Muted Gold (#C6A75E) strictly for high-value accents (borders, active states), never for large backgrounds.
Dusty Rose (#C47A8C) is for secondary actions and soft highlights.

textures: Paper Grain: Overlay a transparent noise texture on the entire body background.
Watercolor Splash: Use soft watercolor blobs behind headers.
Pencil Strokes: Use 'rough-notation' style SVG lines for underlines and circling.

bento_rules: Tilt images slightly (rotate-1 or -rotate-1) to mimic a scrapbook.
Overlap elements: Allow text to cross into image boundaries slightly.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-serif text-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-sketch_shadow
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary bg-transparent px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-serif text-lg hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-primary underline decoration-wavy decoration-accent hover:text-accent transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/40 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

navigation.style: Floating 'frosted paper' bar. bg-[#F5E6E8]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 mt-8 mx-auto w-fit shadow-lg z-50 fixed top-0 left-0 right-0

required_animations: Draw-on-scroll: Lines/Paths appearing as user scrolls.
Fade-up-stagger: List items appearing one by one with a slight delay.
Parallax: Background textures moving slower than foreground content.

hero_main.alt: Artistic sketch portrait of a visionary woman
hero_main.usage: Hero section, large feature. Apply 'multiply' blend mode or mask edges.

team_collaboration.usage: About/Community section. Represents the hackathon spirit.

texture_watercolor.usage: Behind headings or as a decorative corner element.

tech_stack_instructions.fonts: Import Playfair Display and Inter via Google Fonts in index.css

files.css: Use Tailwind classes primarily. Use custom CSS in index.css only for complex animations or textures.

instructions_to_main_agent: 3. THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette defined above.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDE: Do not use default Shadcn styles. Override them to match the 'Sketch' aesthetic (rounded-full buttons, paper cards).
5. NO BORDERS: Avoid hard 1px gray borders. Use shadows or background color differences to separate sections.
6. SKETCH EFFECT: Where possible, use CSS 'mask-image' or SVG borders to create irregular edges on images.
7. PAGE STRUCTURE: Create all 7 pages (Home, Agenda, Facts, Rules, Evaluation, Closing, Contingency) with unique layouts, NOT just text dumps.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
